title: CRE Underwriting Royal Jelly v1
description: Commercial real estate underwriting corpus for rent-roll normalization, NOI reasoning, diligence extraction, and acquisition memo structure.
provenance_summary: Indexed from internal CRE storage corpus with SHA256 receipts and record counts captured from controlled JSONL sources. Curated on sovereign bare-metal RTX 6000 fleet and RTX 3090 systems.
intended_use: Prototype fine-tuning and evaluation flows for CRE underwriting assistants.
not_intended_use: Not for investment advice, lending decisions, or valuation without verified source files.
